data.title: 国际服新专辑《Aria to the Star》MV公开预热礼物
data.summary: The mini musical video “Aria to the Star” will be released on the official YouTube channel! To thank
data.body:
The mini musical video “Aria to the Star” will be released on the official YouTube channel!

To thank you for waiting, we’ve prepared a special gift just for you.
Be sure to check the notice for the coupon code reward as well!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3303924

#BlueArchive
